title: Girl dinner la țară (tot slănină)
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Bună, fetelor! Azi vă arăt 'girl dinner'-ul meu. Adică ce mănânc seara. Spoiler: tot slănină.
shots.image_prompt: sitting at a rustic wooden kitchen table presenting a wooden board with crusty bread, a slab of white lard and a raw onion with both hands like a chef, proud grin, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she presents the wooden board with both hands and grins proudly at the camera, warm coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Pâine de casă. Felie groasă. Fără numărat calorii.
shots.image_prompt: extreme close-up of a thick slice being cut from a round rustic homemade bread loaf on a wooden board, crumbs scattering, warm light, shallow depth of field
shots.motion_prompt: a knife slowly cuts a thick slice from the rustic loaf, crumbs scattering, the slice tipping over, appetizing slow coherent motion
shots.sfx: a knife cutting through crusty bread, crackling crust

shots.line: Apoi, vedeta serii: slănina. Proteină, dragelor.
shots.image_prompt: holding up a thick slab of cured white pork lard on a fork toward the camera with a delighted expression, at the rustic kitchen table, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she holds up the slab of lard on a fork toward the camera and beams, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Un strop de sare, o ceapă, și gata. Ăsta-i tot meniul.
shots.image_prompt: the same wooden board with crusty bread, a slab of white lard and a halved raw onion, a hand sprinkling coarse salt over it, close-up, warm light
shots.motion_prompt: a hand sprinkles coarse salt over the lard and bread on the board, a few grains bouncing, slow appetizing coherent motion, shallow focus

sfx.prompt: coarse salt being sprinkled over food on a board

shots.line: Ăștia zic că-i trend nou. Eu mănânc așa de la război.
shots.image_prompt: taking a big satisfied bite of bread with lard, eyes closed in delight, at the rustic kitchen table, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she takes a big satisfied bite of the bread and lard and closes her eyes in delight, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Desert? O roșie din grădină. Caldă de la soare.
shots.image_prompt: a single ripe red tomato resting on the same rustic wooden board, warm sunlight, a hand setting it down gently beside the bread, close-up
shots.motion_prompt: a hand gently sets a ripe red tomato on the board and it wobbles to a stop, warm light, slow coherent motion, shallow focus
shots.sfx: a soft thunk of a tomato set on a wooden board, quiet kitchen ambience

shots.line: Girl dinner? La mine-i girl dinner, girl prânz și girl mic dejun.
shots.image_prompt: gesturing over the full wooden board with an open-handed proud presentation, big grin, at the rustic kitchen table, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she gestures over the full board with an open-handed proud presentation and grins, warm coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Dați like dacă și la voi cina-i tot slănină. Poftă bună, fetelor! Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: raising a slice of bread with lard toward the camera in a cheers gesture, warm smile, at the rustic kitchen table, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she raises the bread toward the camera in a cheerful toast and smiles, gentle coherent natural motion
